specific_question: What are the average monthly loyalty engagement rates for Gen Z/Millennial customers versus Gen X/Boomer customers at Lee's Market during 2025?
answer: During 2025, Gen Z and Millennial customers engage with the Lee's Market loyalty program at an average monthly rate of 50%, compared with 25% among Gen X and Boomer customers.
justification: The wide engagement gap indicates that younger shoppers are more responsive to app-based and gamified features, whereas older customers favor in-person interactions-validating a hybrid loyalty model.
dr_question: What considerations will need to be made when Lee's Market is redesigning its loyalty program by Q2 2026 to serve both Gen Z/Millennial digital preferences and Gen X/Boomer traditional service expectations?
